reason: This PR only adds an extra 'Commander: <rank>' segment to the HUD selected-unit info panel's text (scripts/HUD.gd show_unit / scripts/OfficerRank.gd). That panel cannot be screenshotted at all right now -- it renders off the top of the screen (a large negative Y position) any time the control bar is also visible, i.e. whenever a unit is selected, due to a pre-existing HUD.gd layout bug (_info_panel_raise reassigns position.y a second time after the panel's first anchor-resolved layout pass, and Godot does not re-resolve the PRESET_BOTTOM_LEFT anchor against that second write). Confirmed against demos/shots/control-bar.png, an existing shipped screenshot selecting three units, where the same panel is likewise absent -- so this predates this PR and isn't something it introduced. Filed as Lacaedemon/sparta#674 with a minimal HUD.gd-independent repro. Until #674 is fixed, no truthful screenshot of this panel is possible. The change was instead verified directly against a live-spawned Unit's state (HUD.show_unit(unit, 1) with a real 140-soldier anti-cavalry Spearmen unit produced the text 'Type: Spearmen  Commander: Primus Pilus', matching OfficerRank.title_for's design) and by the new unit tests in test/unit/test_officer_rank.gd.
